title: The man of God who governs himself is the freest man in the room
caption:
Proverbs 25:28 puts it plainly: a man with no self-control is like a city with no walls. Anyone walks in.

The culture sells a different version of freedom — do what you want, answer to no one, follow every impulse. That's not freedom. That's slavery with better PR.

The free man is the governed man. Not governed by rules, by guilt, or by what other people will think. Governed by the Spirit — which means his appetites don't run him, his mornings aren't hostage to how he feels, and the things that used to own him have less and less grip.

Self-control is Galatians 5:23. It's a fruit of the Spirit. You can't manufacture it. You can stay in the vine.

#faith #selfdiscipline #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #galatians5 #thework #selfcontrol #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
